angler_analysis.presentation_style: Prioritize clean drifts, smaller natural patterns, and stocked-trout attractors where appropriate.

generated_text.quick_read: Fishing conditions on the Soque River are fair to good with recent stocking enhancing opportunities. Expect trout to focus on comfortable feeding lanes near cover as light increases.
generated_text.best_window: The best fishing window is day 1 morning due to low wind speeds, moderate sky cover, and cooler morning temperatures providing favorable trout activity.
generated_text.current_conditions: Current river flow is 64.0 cfs and gage height is 3.55 ft. Water temperature and turbidity data are unavailable.
generated_text.weather_setup: Sky cover averages about 20% with east winds around 2.2 mph and max gusts near 11.5 mph. Rain chances are low at 10%, and pressure data is unavailable.
generated_text.what_this_means: Trout are likely near feeding lanes close to cover under fair conditions. Use clean drifts with smaller natural flies and attractors matching stocked trout preferences. Recommended flies include Egg Pattern, Squirmy Worm, and Duracell. Caution: water temperature and pressure data are missing, so adapt presentations as needed.
